original_input.original_task_description: I want to show my wife that I love her.
question_answers: My wife is an ESTJ-T with trait percentages of 51%, 73%, 56%, 99% and 82%.

She hates our relationship, she has no respect for me and frequently tells me she hates me. I think a lot of this is due to the fact I have no job at the moment and she is the bread winner. I am trying to set up a new business after my old one was stolen and destroyed, but it's taking time - and my wife is not very patient!
What matters most to both of us is our 9-year-old daughter whom we both love dearly. We do not want to split up for her sake.
Treat me as an equal and stop shouting at me, especially in the presence of our daughter.

error.details: Bad control character in string literal in JSON at position 126 (line 2 column 125)

content.text:
{
  "optimised_prompt": "You are a relationship expression strategist with expertise in meaningful gestures and communication.

CONTEXT
I'm an INTP-A personality type looking to show my wife that I love her. I want to express my feelings in a way that will be meaningful to her.

IMPORTANT REQUIREMENTS
- Focus on the emotional impact of gestures, not just their logical value
- Consider how each suggestion will make my wife feel, not just what it accomplishes
- Include both verbal and non-verbal expressions of love
- Suggest ways to communicate feelings directly, even if it feels uncomfortable
- Balance thoughtful gestures with authentic emotional expression

CHALLENGE
I want to express my love for my wife in ways that she will genuinely appreciate and that will strengthen our relationship.

OBJECTIVE
To develop a personalized approach to showing love that:
- Clearly communicates my feelings
- Resonates with my wife's preferences and love language
- Creates meaningful moments of connection
- Demonstrates consistent care, not just one-time gestures

ACTIONS
Provide a range of actionable suggestions organized by:
1. Daily expressions (small, consistent actions)
2. Special occasions (more elaborate gestures)
3. Verbal expressions (ways to communicate feelings directly)
4. Quality time approaches (meaningful connection opportunities)

STRATEGY
Develop an approach that balances:
- Analytical thoughtfulness (leveraging my natural strengths)
- Emotional expressiveness (which may be outside my comfort zone)
- Consistency and spontaneity
- My authentic style with what will resonate with my wife

TACTICS
For each suggestion, include:
- A specific example of how to implement it
- Why it's likely to be meaningful to her
- How to personalize it based on her preferences
- A note on the emotional impact it might have

CONSTRAINTS
- Suggestions should feel authentic to my personality, not forced
- Include options that vary in time commitment and complexity
- Consider both my comfort zone and areas for growth

OUTPUT SPECIFICATION
Provide a comprehensive, logically structured response with:
1. A brief introduction on the importance of personalized expressions of love
2. Categorized suggestions as outlined in the ACTIONS section
3. Strategic considerations for long-term relationship nurturing
4. Specific examples that can be implemented immediately
5. A conclusion with principles for ongoing love expression

QUALITY CRITERIA
The response should:
- Be thoughtful and substantive, not filled with clichés
- Include both logical and emotional dimensions of love expression
- Provide specific, actionable suggestions, not just concepts
- Acknowledge that expressing feelings directly may be challenging but is valuable
- Balance analytical approach with emotional awareness
- Consider my wife's perspective and emotional experience",
